list.name: Add
list.comment: TextField: Simply animations added, JavaDocs added.

task.summary: Default task
Plugin Host Controller: Add plugin in thread thrown error. Add plugin moved from thread to main thread
Anvil: Now available for modifications (non-finale)
Readme: Updated minor things
ListCells: Optimize for list's
AudioHost: Fixed freeze open animation
Dialogs, SoundSlider, Art and more: New java docs added
ListCells: New view and minor optimization
UI: Minor view style and animations update
Version file updated
Root: Tooltips now handle inside Platform thread
VstPluginListCell: Re open button was removed
Minor updates in all project
New Java-Docs and minor update in all project (scripts, src, tests, etc.)
Readme updated
Updates Scripts, Added new Java-Docs.
Minor refactor in TempoShifter.java and tempo_shifter.cpp
Root: LicenseDialog updated to AnimationDialog
Documentation html page created
TempoShifter update to more optimize
Documentation updates
Animations: Minor optimize updates
Anvil: Added feature of disable load some mods
Modification docs updated
Script for download zip from release, updated to unpack zip and launch .exe inside
Readme updated: added link to auto download script
Windows script dor download renamed
Readme updated
Fixed LightAudio download tracks, added user agents
Soundcloud moved to own module into another jar
Added aspects style to key binds
Added system volume control from mouse wheel
refactor: track parse method moved to Track.java
tests: added AnimationsTest.java a test class
added: Profilers classes aspects to KeyBindingController.java
fix: TrackHistoryTest test fixed
fix: minor fixes in PlayProcessor
minor fixes and added
Root.java basic docs added
Root refactored to singleton and object specification
Fixed the problem of not being able to download and use audio files from services has been fixed - a redirect has been added
Fixed the bug of incorrect loading of statistics, which consisted of initializing the controller BEFORE loading the actual data, has been resolved.
Fixed a bug with incorrect width calculation for selectionRect when selecting, and a bug with merging some colors (now they are just darker)
Python scripts for buildings extended new additional input functional
Update gitignore
TrackHistory logic migrate to super class History.java, and now is extended History.java
Concept of files managers edited
IParseAlbumArt.java now is functional interface
Minor bugs fixed, and netty track listcell optimized
Removed from gitignore

MESSAGE.value: Windows script dor download renamed
Readme updated
Fixed LightAudio download tracks, added user agents
Soundcloud moved to own module into another jar
Added aspects style to key binds
Added system volume control from mouse wheel
refactor: track parse method moved to Track.java
tests: added AnimationsTest.java a test class
added: Profilers classes aspects to KeyBindingController.java
fix: TrackHistoryTest test fixed
fix: minor fixes in PlayProcessor
minor fixes and added
Root.java basic docs added
Root refactored to singleton and object specification
Fixed the problem of not being able to download and use audio files from services has been fixed - a redirect has been added
Fixed the bug of incorrect loading of statistics, which consisted of initializing the controller BEFORE loading the actual data, has been resolved.
Fixed a bug with incorrect width calculation for selectionRect when selecting, and a bug with merging some colors (now they are just darker)
Python scripts extended new additional input functional
Python scripts for buildings extended new additional input functional
Update gitignore
TrackHistory logic migrate to super class History.java, and now is extended History.java
Concept of files managers edited
IParseAlbumArt.java now is functional interface
Minor bugs fixed, and netty track listcell optimized
Removed from gitignore
